description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to manually build a binary on Windows (x86-64). The workflow should set up a Windows 2022 environment, install necessary tools and libraries including Python 3.13, PyInstaller, Qt, PyQt, numpy, and other modules. It should then build Veusz extensions, run tests, create a binary with PyInstaller, generate an NSI file, create an installer using NSIS, and upload the installer and zip artifacts.
